title: More Tools And Armor
body:
This mod adds 6 new swords, tools, and armor.

It also includes 8 new Apple/Enchanted Apple variants each with their own effects.

New block "Lamp" also added. It might be a little buggy with shaders on, but I am working on it.

**Inspired by More Tools Addon**

**Textures by SorYPMod**

**List of Items:**

# Swords

![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d1c9183620f0d3af1863486b8400e0513749723.png)

-Redstone Sword

-Lapis Sword

-Quartz Sword

-Emerald Sword

-Copper Sword

-Amethyst Sword

# Tools

![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ea040198327f724c96296160bd692e9e27224d.png)

-Redstone

-Lapis

-Quartz

-Emerald

-Copper

-Amethyst

# Armor

![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52d685f3e87f8d7391c7f2e0d5038b62f3f5d153.png)

-Lapis

-Quartz

-Emerald

-Copper

-Amethyst

![Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eff88eb9a84bc7b7cf528615eaef918711db9231.png)

![Lamp Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe78a1864e7f189b57feedf3d2e2fc3dcf7f649.png)

-Block of Redstone
